hooks.command: input=$(cat); path=$(echo "$input" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))"); if echo "$path" | grep -qE 'CLAUDE\.md$'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"CLAUDE.md is human-owned and system-protected. Propose changes via a message to the user instead."}'; exit 2; fi
